tools.name: browse_prediction_markets
tools.description: Browse prediction markets from Polymarket and Manifold. Filter by category (crypto, politics, sports, economics, science, entertainment, pop-culture) or search by keyword.

tools.name: get_market_details
tools.description: Get detailed information for a specific prediction market including prices, outcomes, and trading volume.

tools.name: get_trending_predictions
tools.description: Get what the prediction markets are betting on right now. Fetches top markets by volume/liquidity.
